use_cases: Call-to-action buttons that require visual emphasis and brand-aligned gradient styling
Form submission buttons with customizable hover text color transitions
Navigation trigger buttons with gradient border effects
CTA buttons in landing pages and marketing sections
Interactive elements requiring delayed hover color animations for polish
ai_summary: A customizable gradient button component with a striking multi-color border effect and configurable hover animations. The button supports delayed color transitions, optional icons, and flexible width configurations. It features a dark default background with vibrant gradient borders and smooth text color transitions on hover, making it ideal for prominent CTAs in SaaS and e-commerce interfaces.
